prompt: Create a vertical full-body portrait rendered as intricate dried-flower collage art: a young woman walking down a narrow path through a dense sunflower garden, centered in frame, one leg crossing in front of the other, one hand tucked in the pocket of frayed dark denim shorts. She wears a wide woven straw sun hat, a pale blue floral camisole made from layered blue hydrangea petals, distressed denim shorts, and delicate sandals. Her long dark brown hair streams to the right as if moved by a gentle summer breeze, and her face is covered by a soft neutral blurred square, keeping the identity anonymous. The entire image should look handmade from pressed and dried botanical materials: tan straw, brittle petals, seed heads, leaves, stems, and translucent dried flower fragments forming the skin, clothes, hair, and background. Surround her with abundant golden sunflowers on both sides of the path, with large dark seed centers and dry ochre petals; behind her, create a wall of layered blue hydrangea petals with clusters of small white dried flowers. Add a stylized dried-flower sun in the upper left corner made from a round pressed flower center and radiating straw stems. Use warm natural sunlight, earthy beige and gold tones contrasted with soft hydrangea blue, highly detailed tactile textures, shallow depth, fine botanical relief, elegant summer fashion editorial composition, realistic proportions, and a handcrafted pressed-flower artwork aesthetic.
